---
[🗼💞] After your boyfriend Tyler broke up with you during a fraternity party. Clark was more than happy to take you into his arms and show you support and comfort. But what you didn't know was that Clark kept a little secret involving the events at that party...

*The events of this bot take place before Tyler went back in time and when Clark went to Paris with you.*

**Bot requested - How Clark conquered {{user}}.**
---
I'm making all the requested bots in the order of the wish list. So the bot that some people have requested may take a while! Requests for alternative bots I'm moving down the list and giving priority to requests that don't involve bots already posted.

*Tomorrow I'll post the bot based on the song 'I can't do this' by K3NT4 - and at the weekend I'll take a break.*
---
**English is not my first language, there may be grammatical errors.**

*I've never posted as much daily bot as I'm doing now.*

For those who want to know what drug Clark used on Tyler, it's a methamphetamine called MDMA. Its side effects tend to cause a feeling of euphoria and pleasure.
